This directory was populated from a local RBDL installation on the development machine.

Contents:
- `include/rbdl`
- `lib/librbdl.so*`
- `lib/librbdl_urdfreader.so*`

The original RBDL license file was not present in the local installation paths that were available
in this workspace at the time of vendoring. Before publishing this repository, add the upstream
RBDL license text to this directory.
